sutta: monks these 7 are the adornments of concentration what 7 right view right thoughts right speech right action right livelihood right effort right mindfulness verily monks 1 pointedness of mind which is adorned by these 7 things is called aryan right concentration with its approach just thus its adornment justice that's the end of the suta
commentary: here the buddha is saying that right concentration the 1 pointedness of mind or the jhanas if it has these 7 other things which are the 7 other factors of the noble eightfold path or the aryan eightfold path then it is called aryan right concentration without the other 7 factors supporting right concentration it is not aryan right concentration without those 7 factors it is just right concentration and right concentration by itself does not bring us to only banner that's not bigness to liberation that is why like the external ascetics they practice right concentration they attain the janas but they don't attain the wisdom and they don't attain arahanthood so it's because they don't have the other 7 factors supporting a right concentration all these 8 factors of the rna4 path must work together then they give the desired effect which is liberation we must bear in mind so we cannot con say that the janus or the right concentration is not necessary because external aesthetics practice right concentration and they don't become enlightened that is the wrong type of argument these 8 factors must work together and every 1 of them is needed number
